Michael Rapkine, Esq.(626-535-1900) of Anglin Flewelling Rasmussen Campbell & Trytten, LLP for Defendant/ Moving party WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. through Court Call

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court has concluded Plaintiff pleads facts supporting cause of action and it is not pre-empted. Both sides ARGUED. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
